landing.heroTitle: A Modern Platform for Learning and Teaching
landing.heroDesc: On the Ustoz platform, teachers create quality courses and students gain professional knowledge.
landing.step1Desc: Create a free account with your email or phone number
landing.step2Desc: Browse and select courses across dozens of subjects
landing.step3Desc: Gain knowledge through video lessons, quizzes and assignments
landing.categoriesDesc: Choose a subject that interests you
landing.statsDesc: A platform trusted by thousands of users
landing.ctaDesc: Thousands of students and teachers are already using the Ustoz platform. Start today and take your career to the next level!
landing.testimonial1: Through the Ustoz platform, I was able to share my knowledge with thousands of students. A very convenient and professional system!
landing.testimonial2: An excellent platform for learning programming. Video lessons are clear, tests are useful, and the certificate opportunity is motivating.
landing.testimonial3: All the resources needed for learning English in one place. Interactive lessons and practical exercises are very effective.
landing.faqDesc: Answers to the most common questions
landing.faq1Q: Is the platform free to use?
landing.faq1A: Registration and viewing some courses is free. Each course has its own price — there are also free courses.
landing.faq2Q: How do I get a certificate?
landing.faq2A: When you complete 100% of a course, a digital certificate is automatically issued. You can download and verify it.
landing.faq3A: You can pay via Click and Payme. Payments are safe and secure.
landing.faq4Q: What do I need to become a teacher?
landing.faq4A: Sign up and apply as a teacher. Once your application is reviewed, you can start creating courses.
landing.faq5Q: Can I watch courses on mobile?
landing.faq5A: Yes, the platform is fully responsive — you can use it on phone, tablet and computer.
landing.faq6A: The teacher sets the course price themselves. Free courses can also be created.
landing.aboutDesc1: The mission of the Ustoz platform is to make quality education accessible to everyone in Uzbekistan.
landing.aboutDesc2: Our platform gives professional teachers the opportunity to share their knowledge with a wide audience, and students to gain deep knowledge in various fields.
landing.visionDesc: To become the leading online education platform in Uzbekistan
landing.missionDesc: To make quality education open and accessible to everyone
landing.studentWorksDesc: Success stories of our platform students
landing.partnersDesc: Leading educational institutions collaborating with us
landing.cookieText: We use cookies on our site. They help improve the platform, ensure security, and create a better experience for you.
landing.cookieEssentialDesc: Required for site operation: session, authentication, security
landing.cookieAnalyticsDesc: To understand and improve how the site is used
landing.cookieMarketingDesc: To recommend suitable courses for you

about.pageSubtitle: Ustoz is a modern educational platform with a mission to make quality online education accessible to everyone in Uzbekistan
about.missionDesc1: Through the Ustoz platform, we aim to deliver quality education to every person in Uzbekistan. We believe that access to knowledge should be open and convenient for everyone.
about.missionDesc2: Our platform gives professional teachers the opportunity to share their knowledge with a wide audience, while opening paths for students to gain deep knowledge and professional development in various fields.
about.missionDesc3: We strive to make the educational process effective and engaging by applying modern technologies and innovative teaching methods.
about.visionDesc: To become the leading online education platform in Uzbekistan and transform millions of lives
about.goalDesc: To make quality education open and accessible to everyone, uniting professional teachers and students
about.valuesSubtitle: We operate based on the following principles
about.valueQualityDesc: Every course meets high quality standards
about.valueConvenienceDesc: Opportunity to learn anytime and anywhere
about.valueCommunityDesc: A supportive environment for teachers and students
about.achievement3Desc: A team of professional teachers was formed
about.achievement4Desc: AI-based personalized learning paths were added
about.philosophy1Desc: We consider each student's unique learning style and pace. Our platform offers individual learning paths.
about.philosophy2Desc: We focus on students achieving real results. Every course provides practical skills and knowledge.
about.philosophy3Desc: All courses undergo strict quality control. We only provide high-quality educational materials.
about.contactSubtitle: Have questions? We are ready to help you
about.footerDesc: A modern online education platform. Learn, teach, grow.
